changelog: NEW: Auto-pilot Demo Recorder (Phase 1). Long-press the 'Parental Controls' header in Settings to open the hidden marketing tool. Captures 1080p / 60 fps / 12 Mbps screen recording with system audio, then drives a ~90-second scripted tour of every Home section (Discovery, Streaming Services, Movie Collections incl. Star Wars, Genres, Themes & Moods, Decades). MP4 is saved to app-private storage and auto-uploaded to the sync server.
Dev-flavor only — Official and Canada builds ship without the hidden trigger so end users never see it.
Recordings are listed under the admin panel at /api/admin/demo/recordings and can be downloaded as MP4 for stitching with voiceover (Phase 2).
